overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking from a dark indoor stone corridor through a medieval village at dusk, eventually reaching an outer gate area with guards. The scene transitions from enclosed torch-lit interiors to open cobblestone streets with half-timbered architecture and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone corridor with barred gate

events.description: approaching the barred gate at the end of the corridor with blue light visible beyond

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the torch-lit stone corridor toward the barred gate

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone blocks forming the corridor walls
burning torch mounted on the wall casting warm orange light
metal-barred gate blocking the corridor exit with blue light visible beyond
arched stone doorway framing the barred gate

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, enclosed stone corridor illuminated by wall-mounted torches. The character walks forward toward a barred metal gate, with rough stone walls on both sides. The atmosphere is dim and claustrophobic, with the only light coming from the flickering torches and a mysterious blue glow visible through the gate bars.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with half-timbered houses

events.description: exiting the stone corridor into the open air of the medieval village at dusk
approaching a brick archway leading to the outer village area

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow cobblestone streets lined with half-timbered houses and occasional villagers

notable_agents.action: villager woman sweeping the cobblestones with a broom

entered.detail: traditional medieval building with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the torchlight
wall-mounted torch providing warm illumination against the blue dusk sky
red brick archway marking the transition to the outer village area
simple wooden picket fence along the building edge

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark corridor into a medieval village at dusk. The narrow cobblestone street is lined with half-timbered houses, their windows glowing with warm light. Wall-mounted torches cast flickering shadows on the wet stones. A villager sweeps the street on the right as the character walks toward a brick archway in the distance, with the blue hour sky visible above the rooftops.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer village area with fortified gate and guards

events.description: passing through the brick archway into the more open outer area
passing by guards in red uniforms carrying torches near the gate

agents.ego_description: walking through the outer area toward the fortified gate, passing guards with torches

notable_agents.action: guard in red uniform holding a burning torch
guard standing watch near the stone gatehouse wall

entered.detail: fortified stone gatehouse with arched entrance and crenellations
wooden market stall with red canopy and goods displayed
iron lantern hanging from a bracket illuminating the gate area
wooden plank barricade near the gate entrance

segments.scene_description: Passing through the brick archway, the scene opens into a wider outer area with grass verges alongside the cobblestone path. The character approaches a fortified stone gatehouse, passing guards in red uniforms carrying torches. A market stall with a red canopy stands to the left, while hanging lanterns illuminate the approach to the main gate. The atmosphere remains atmospheric with the darkening sky and warm torchlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, torch-lit stone corridor into the open, atmospheric outskirts of a medieval village at dusk. It begins in a dim interior with rough stone walls, moving forward toward a barred metal gate where a mysterious blue glow pierces the darkness. As the character emerges from the corridor, the scene opens onto a narrow cobblestone street lined with glowing half-timbered houses and a villager sweeping the wet stones under a deep blue hour sky. The camera then passes through a brick archway, shifting from the enclosed village center to a wider outer area with grassy verges and a red-canopied market stall. Finally, the path leads toward a fortified stone gatehouse, passing guards in red uniforms as hanging lanterns illuminate the approach to the main gate.
